goog.module('devirtualizedsupermethodcall.OtherSubNumber$impl');

const Number = goog.require('java.lang.Number$impl');
const $Util = goog.require('nativebootstrap.Util$impl');

let $Long = goog.forwardDeclare('nativebootstrap.Long$impl');

class OtherSubNumber extends Number {
 /** @protected @nodts */
 constructor() {
  super();
 }
 /** @nodts @return {!OtherSubNumber} */
 static $create__() {
  OtherSubNumber.$clinit();
  let $instance = new OtherSubNumber();
  $instance.$ctor__devirtualizedsupermethodcall_OtherSubNumber__void();
  return $instance;
 }
 /** @nodts */
 $ctor__devirtualizedsupermethodcall_OtherSubNumber__void() {
  this.$ctor__java_lang_Number__void();
 }
 /** @override @nodts @return {number} */
 m_intValue__int() {
  return 0;
 }
 /** @override @nodts @return {!$Long} */
 m_longValue__long() {
  return $Long.fromInt(0);
 }
 /** @override @nodts @return {number} */
 m_floatValue__float() {
  return 0;
 }
 /** @override @nodts @return {number} */
 m_doubleValue__double() {
  return 0;
 }
 /** @override @nodts @return {number} */
 m_byteValue__byte() {
  return 0;
 }
 /** @override @nodts @return {number} */
 m_shortValue__short() {
  return 0;
 }
 /** @nodts */
 static $clinit() {
  OtherSubNumber.$clinit = () =>{};
  OtherSubNumber.$loadModules();
  Number.$clinit();
 }
 /** @nodts @return {boolean} */
 static $isInstance(/** ? */ instance) {
  return instance instanceof OtherSubNumber;
 }
 
 /** @nodts */
 static $loadModules() {
  $Long = goog.module.get('nativebootstrap.Long$impl');
 }
}
$Util.$setClassMetadata(OtherSubNumber, 'devirtualizedsupermethodcall.OtherSubNumber');

exports = OtherSubNumber;
